citations.narrative:
This carrier conducted regulated activity without an active registration when they accepted an approximately 4-month-old
Pomeranian puppy for transport on September 9, 2025. Their registration expired on December 11, 2023. The carrier
stated that she was unaware that the registration had expired.
Proper registration is essential for ensuring compliance with the Animal Welfare Act and Regulations during transportation
of covered animals in commerce. Each carrier or intermediate handler who handles covered animals shall ensure that
they are registered by completing and filing a properly executed registration form, and updating the registration form every
3 years by the completion and filing of a new form.
Correct by applying for a new registration. No regulated activity may be conducted until a valid USDA registration is
obtained.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.25(a) 
   
Requirements and procedures. 
This carrier conducted regulated activity without an active registration when they accepted an approximately 4-month-old 
Pomeranian puppy for transport on September 9, 2025. Their registration expired on December 11, 2023. The carrier 
stated that she was unaware that the registration had expired. 
 
Proper registration is essential for ensuring compliance with the Animal Welfare Act and Regulations during transportation 
of covered animals in commerce. Each carrier or intermediate handler who handles covered animals shall ensure that 
they are registered by completing and filing a properly executed registration form, and updating the registration form every 
3 years by the completion and filing of a new form. 
 
Correct by applying for a new registration. No regulated activity may be conducted until a valid USDA registration is 
obtained. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
